introContent.title: Meet the sub-, inter- and super- prefix family
paragraphs: These prefixes can tell us about position, connection or going beyond something.

examples.meaning: A submarine is a boat that travels under the sea.
International means involving more than one country.
A superhero is a hero with special powers.

profile.reflection: What position, connection or extra meaning did each prefix add?

review.note: Profile-only correction. Existing canonical rows, true morphology, pronunciation, dictation, bands and teaching splits remain unchanged.
